title: Xiphion sordidum

The plant is a member of the genus Xiphion, which is closely related to the genus Gladiolus. Xiphion sordidum is characterized by its narrow, sword-shaped leaves and tall, upright spikes of small, star-shaped flowers. The plant's classification places it within the order Asparagales, which includes many species of flowering plants with similar characteristics.
